# ArchiveLocation constructor

Where a stored blob lives in the local archive set: which `data.NNN` file, at what byte offset, and how long.

```csharp
public ArchiveLocation(int ArchiveIndex, long Offset, int Size)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| ArchiveIndex | The `data.NNN` archive number. |
| Offset | Byte offset of the blob's archive envelope. |
| Size | Envelope length in bytes (30-byte header + BLTE). |
